name: unraid-modernui
description: Clean, flat, responsive theme for Unraid 7.x. v0.5.8: Docker page gains a floating update-progress panel (container name + byte-weighted overall % + inferred download speed, persisted across navigation via sessionStorage) and a one-click "Update all" action for every container with an available update. UX fixes: the folder default Expanded/Collapsed control no longer inverts manually-toggled folders, and the row/tag-modal checkbox tick is now mathematically centered (inline SVG). CI runs the TS test suite + asset build on every PR.

scripts.test: npm run test:ts && npm run test:php
